title: DNA extraction and quantification
author: Rene Flores Clavo
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bsj4ncqw

steps.title: Resuspend previously grown bacterial cells (approximately...
steps.instruction: Resuspend previously grown bacterial cells (approximately 50 mg of bacterial fresh biomass) in 400 µL de TE 1X (10mM of Tris-HCl, 1mM of EDTA pH 8,0).

steps.title: Add 1 µL of lysozyme (100mg/ml)...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL of lysozyme (100mg/ml) shortly vórtex, and incubate for 1 h at 37 °C.

steps.title: Add 67,5 µL of SDS 10...
steps.instruction: Add 67,5 µL of SDS 10 % (pre-heated at 65 °C) and 2,5 µL of Proteinase K (10 mg/mL) and shortly vórtex, and incubate at 65 °C for 10 min.

steps.title: Add 100 µL of NaCl at...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL of NaCl at 5M and 100 µL of a solution of Cetyltrimethylammonium Bromide (CTAB)/NaCl (0,03 M/0,07 M), both pre-heated at 65 °C, and vortex until observing a whitish color and incubate at 65 °C for 10 min.

steps.title: Add 750 µL of chloroform/isoamyl alcohol...
steps.instruction: Add 750 µL of chloroform/isoamyl alcohol (24:1), vortex for 10 s and centrifugate at 12.000 rpm for 5 min.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant (approximately 800 µL)...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant (approximately 800 µL) to a new tube and add 0,6 volumes of isopropyl alcohol to precipitate the DNA and gently invert the tube.

steps.title: Store at -20 °C for 30-60...
steps.instruction: Store at -20 °C for 30-60 min in case precipitated DNA is not observed.

steps.title: Centrifugate at 4 °C at 12000 rpm for 5 min
steps.instruction: Centrifugate at 4 °C at 12000 rpm for 5 min.

steps.title: Discard the supernatant and add 1...
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant and add 1 mL of ice-cold ethanol 70% (-20 °C).

steps.title: Centrifugate at 12
steps.instruction: Centrifugate at 12.000 rpm for 5 min and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Centrifugate at 12
steps.instruction: Centrifugate at 12.000 rpm for 5 min and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Centrifugate at 12
steps.instruction: Centrifugate at 12.000 rpm at 4 °C for 1 min to let the ethanol evaporate at room temperature.

steps.title: Invert the tubes, place them on...
steps.instruction: Invert the tubes, place them on absorbent paper, and then use a speedvac at 36 °C for 30 min to let them completely dry.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in a volume...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in a volume of 20 µL of MilliQ water (add more water if necessary, according to the concentration of the pellet).

steps.title: Check the DNA quality by migrating...
steps.instruction: Check the DNA quality by migrating different concentrations of it and using a control λ phage concentration of 50 ng/µL in an agarose gel with 1 % of TBE 1X ran for 30 min at 5 V per cm 2
